change.purpose: Fetch the stable well-known deployment identity path and reject stale commits, wrong repositories, malformed content, unsafe privacy flags, non-JSON bodies, and non-success responses.
change.privacy_boundary: Verifier output contains only URL, HTTP status, bounded reason codes, schema version, surface, repository, and source commit; response bodies are never persisted.

verification.runtime: Node.js isolated local execution before commit
cases: reject stale commit, wrong repository, and unsafe privacy flag
normalize to the stable well-known path
reject non-JSON and HTTP failure without leaking response body

limits: The verifier is not yet wired into the Cloudflare deployment workflow.
No Cloudflare hostname resolved during this run.
Manifest equality proves deployed source identity only, not scientific or medical truth.
falsification_route: After workflow wiring and deployment, mutate or cache a manifest with a different commit, repository, privacy flag, status, or content type; the verifier must reject it and emit only bounded reason codes.
